parties.name: GAUMER, SCOTT ELIOT 355 1ST STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94105

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Scott Gaumer in Propria Persona.
Andrea McEvoy in Propria Persona.

Mr. Gaumer stated that they got married in Mauritius an Island in the middle of the Indian Ocean on August 31, 2017, that there is no record of their marriage in the State of California, that it is a third world country and that they are concerned about proper record keeping in the future. The Court noted that the parties have a certified copy of their marriage certificate, stated that the State of California only has records of marriages that occur here, and that this process is for people who get married and there are no records in any country. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
